# Transmit. Connect. Act.

#### The trusted global source for the transformation, enhancement, and secure exchange of digital information.

- [Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/request-a-demo/)
- [View Our Solutions](https://www.consensus.com/#lottieAnimation)

![](https://www.consensus.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/img-home1-v1.png)

# Unlock Valuable, Actionable Data to Improve Quality of Care

#### Transform unstructured documents to structured data with research-validated NLP and AI tools. Unveil valuable, insightful information that helps patients receive the care they need to lead healthier lives.

- [Request a Demo](https://www.consensus.com/request-a-demo/)
- [Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/clarity/)

![](https://www.consensus.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/pano-industry-manufacturing-v1.png)

# Enhance Financial Document Workflows. Translate Savings into Customer Benefits.

#### Access critical, secure banking data when and where you need it.

- [Request a Demo](https://www.consensus.com/request-a-demo/)

![](https://www.consensus.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/pano-industry-financial.png)

# Data Exchange Solutions. Made Easy.

#### Life Insurance companies operate to serve three basic purposes: financial protection, peace of mind and building wealth for customers. Consensus Cloud Solutions offer services that help meet those goals, while decreasing manual labor and accelerating contractual processes.

- [Request a Demo](https://www.consensus.com/request-a-demo/)

## Advancing digital maturity and the evolution of healthcare interoperability, by unlocking essential data and delivering it securely when, where and how you need it.

![](https://www.consensus.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/icon-curve-right.svg)

![icon of isomorphic cloud](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20129%20107'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### HIPAA Compliant Digital Cloud Faxing

The only fax service that guides you to better forms of electronic and interoperable exchange

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/efaxcorporate/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2071%20185'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Direct Secure    Messaging

Send and receive any patient information over a trusted healthcare network with over a million addresses.

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/unite)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20160%20164'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Patient    Information Query

Electronically query records and retrieve patient information on demand from Carequality including those connected through the CommonWell Health Alliance.

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/unite/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20113%20163'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Data Exchange   Networks

Connectivity access to referral networks, ACOs and HIEs across the nation.

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/unite/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20161%20164'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Interoperability   Platform

Interface engine and complete interoperability platform provides seamless integration technology

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/conductor)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20226%20187'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### HIPAA Compliant   eSignatures

Effortlessly sign, send, track, and manage the entire e-signature process.

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/jsign/)

![icon of brain activity](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20133%20112'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Natural Language   Processing / AI

Go from unstructured documents to actionable, analytics-ready structured data that can be sent to the right person at the right time.

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/clarity/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20161%20138'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### API    Connectivity

Access numerous endpoints, securely and simply with one API connectivity and avoid developing one-offs to disparate healthcare systems.

[Learn More](https://www.consensus.com/products/harmony/)

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201500%20968'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

> … in recent years, the regulatory and admin side of medicine has gotten much more complicated. With all of these new mandates and paperwork requirements, we wouldn’t be able to run our facility efficiently without tech like cloud fax.![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2098%2098'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

> Having a user-friendly workspace with the ability to manage patient health records for cloud faxing, direct message and record based query would help our organization expand standardly into varied health environments with confidence to support the workflow and uneven user needs and technical capabilities,![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2098%2098'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

> Associate Vice President, Primary Care at UAB Medicine

###### Consensus.com Accessibility Statement

×

At Consensus, we are committed to ensuring that individuals with disabilities can access all of the content offered by Consensus through its website, www.Consensus.com, and its mobile applications. If you are having trouble accessing www.Consensus.com or Consensus's mobile apps, please email legal@consensus.com for assistance. Please put "ADA Inquiry" in the subject line of your email.

Manage Cookie Consent

We use cookies and other similar technologies to personalize and enhance your experience on our website. Visit our [Privacy Policy](https://www.consensus.com/privacy-policy/) to learn more. You may withdraw your consent at [any time](https://www.consensus.com/list-of-cookies/).

FunctionalFunctional
Always active

The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.

PreferencesPreferences

The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.

StatisticsStatistics

The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes.The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.

MarketingMarketing

The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.
